title: duggena bracteosa
intro: Duggena bracteosa, also known as the African horned cucumber, is a type of plant that belongs to the Cucurbitaceae family, native to tropical Africa. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Duggena bracteosa include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and ointments, which are used to treat various ailments, and it is also consumed as a vegetable in some parts of Africa.
